physical_anchor: Wiry, half-grown mountain boy on the cusp of a man's frame — shoulders widening faster than his chest has filled, wrists and hands already too big for his sleeves, cheeks still soft under the first dark down of a moustache. Habitually stands a half-step nearer to whichever man is speaking than a child should, hands hovering at his belt as if a dagger he does not yet own were there.
vocal_quality: Bright, breath-forward adolescent tenor in the cracked zone between boy and man, tempo quick and clipped under awe, dropping to a hushed, respectful murmur around elders.
social_presence: Occupies a room by orbiting its centre rather than holding it — a watchful, held-breath presence at thresholds and doorways, unnoticed until his wide, memorising eyes give him away.
